sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31763" key="e)kbolimai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκβολ-ῐμαῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> sq., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl> Astr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
